title: Dragon Ball Z Totems Pack Optifine
description: A fan-made resource pack that transforms your Totem of Undying into Dragon Ball Z characters with OptiFine CIT support. Featuring Goku, Vegeta, and more Saiyans to come!
body:
![totem banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1751ee9775b04c8e4e8ddd0abbae104fe3228a.png)

![collection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f298c3ce5f09b64e4566b78f3fba56364c8df2.png)

## 📜 Full Description
Step into the world of **Dragon Ball Z** with this custom Minecraft resource pack!  
Each **Totem of Undying** is reimagined as an iconic DBZ character, designed in **detailed pixel art** for a faithful anime vibe.  

This pack supports **OptiFine CIT**, so each totem can be renamed to match its character.

✨ **Current Characters:**  

- **Goku Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-goku)
- **Vegeta Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-vegeta)
- **Gohan Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-gohan)
- **Picolo Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-picolo)
- **Frieza Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-frieza)
- **Roshi Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-roshi)

⚡ **Features:**  
- Works on **Minecraft 1.16 → 1.21+**  
- **OptiFine CIT required** (for custom naming)   
- Lightweight and compatible with most other packs  
- Future updates will expand the DBZ roster  

📖 **Installation & Usage:**  
1. Install **OptiFine** for your Minecraft version.  
2. Place this pack into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks/` folder.  
3. Enable the pack in your Resource Packs menu.  
4. Rename your **Totem of Undying** in an anvil to match a character:  
   - `Goku`  
   - `Vegeta`  
   - `Gohan`  
   - `Picolo`
   - `Roshi`  
   - `Frieza`
  
👑 **Credits:**  
- Created by **Totem Factory DBX**.  
- Dragon Ball Z is owned by **Toei Animation & Akira Toriyama**.  
- This is a **fan-made, non-commercial project**, made purely for fun.
